sourcePrompt: An SA-2 Guideline surface-to-air missile on its launcher, the missile alone over ten meters long. A slender two-stage missile - cruciform fins at the tail of a flared booster, smaller fins mid-body and at the pointed nose - angled steeply skyward on a single launch rail atop a rotating pedestal with a trailer-style base. White missile with green-drab launcher steel, tall and threatening.
handEdit: rail assembly shifted +2.4 local-x so the rail pivots near its REAR (real SA-2 layout): booster tail/fins/truss now clear the ground (were buried to y=-1.45); missile and shoes ride the same shift
